name: Owendaw Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Hominy gives this bread its distinctive flavor. Like all spoon breads, it should be eaten very hot with plenty of butter.
2. Beat the eggs until light and add to the hominy.
3. Add milk to the mixture.
4. Stir in cornmeal and salt.
5. Pour the batter into a deep, buttered pan.
6. Bake in a 375 degree F (190 degree C) oven for about 30 minutes (about 1 hour in a glass baking dish).
7. Serve immediately.
This recipe originally appeared in The Carolina Housewife.
